name: What happens if the other side finds out I used ChatGPT prompts in my lawsuit?
description: Prompts are discoverable if relevant; treat like any case document and consult lawyer.[4][5]

mainEntity.name: What happens if the other side finds out I used ChatGPT prompts in my lawsuit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prompts are discoverable if relevant; treat like any case document and consult lawyer.[4][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: AI prompts and generated documents are potentially discoverable as evidence in litigation.[4][5] Courts may compel production if relevant, similar to other work product, raising concerns over data scraping and regurgitation by models like ChatGPT.[4] Key factors: No privilege for AI inputs unless protected; relevance to case strategy; subpoenas possible but require justification.[3] Preserve all prompts and outputs now; consult a lawyer on privilege assertions before responding to discovery. Avoid inputting confidential info into public AI tools.
